name: dusk-developer-testnet-studio
description: Developer cockpit for DuskEVM reference and DuskDS workflows.

scripts.build: pnpm check:freshness && pnpm --filter @dusk/core build && pnpm --filter @dusk/studio build
scripts.test: vitest run && node scripts/test-npm-package.mjs && node scripts/test-npm-package-browser-telemetry.mjs && node scripts/test-cargo-advisory-review.mjs && node scripts/test-public-repository.mjs && node scripts/test-source-freshness.mjs && node scripts/test-source-boundary.mjs && node scripts/test-release-manifest.mjs && node scripts/test-assurance.mjs && node scripts/test-agent-pilot-collector.mjs && node scripts/test-agent-pilot-plan.mjs && node scripts/test-agent-pilot-evidence-assembler.mjs && node scripts/test-github-actions-provenance.mjs && node scripts/test-prepublication-candidate-binding.mjs && node scripts/test-resolve-main-assurance-artifact.mjs && node scripts/test-phase5-evidence.mjs && node scripts/test-comprehensive-validation.mjs && node scripts/test-staging-smoke.mjs && node scripts/test-monitor-heartbeat.mjs
scripts.verify:local: pnpm check:boundary && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm check:release && pnpm check:assurance
scripts.test:npm: vitest run packages/local-runtime packages/templates/src/duskDsCounterForge.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/executableResolution.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/preflight.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/runBoundedProcess.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/serverSecurity.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/safePaths.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/transactionalScaffold.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/scaffoldTemplate.test.ts packages/local-agent/src/__tests__/cloneDuskDsStarter.test.ts && node scripts/test-npm-package.mjs && node scripts/test-npm-package-browser-telemetry.mjs
